title: hieracium erucophyllum subsp. erucophyllum
intro: Hieracium erucophyllum subsp. erucophyllum, also known as the lesser hawkweed, is a perennial plant in the dandelion family that is native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Hieracium erucophyllum subsp. erucophyllum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues, including digestive problems and skin irritations.
